rows.prompt: Centered on a clean white background, a large soft-edged circle in warm orange forms the base like a cross-section of citrus fruit; inside it, thin curved white lines radiate from the center like orange segments to suggest a slice; layered on top, a bright yellow-green droplet shape rises from the bottom, its rounded body overlapping the fruit circle to imply a smoothie splash; a small white highlight oval sits on the upper left of the droplet to give it a glossy, liquid feel; two tiny green leaf shapes sprout from the top of the droplet, curving outward to add a fresh, natural touch; the entire icon is drawn with smooth, friendly rounded edges and bold flat colors to feel playful, healthy, and energetic.

Center a soft circular backdrop in pale sky blue (#8ECAE6) representing calm and openness; within it place a simplified human head-in-profile silhouette facing right, rendered in deep slate blue (#2A4759) with a smooth, gentle outline to feel approachable rather than clinical; inside the head, instead of a solid fill, show a rising sun made of concentric warm-orange (#F4A261) arcs peeking up from the base of the skull area to symbolize hope and new beginnings; where the forehead meets the top of the head, morph the silhouette into a few open petal shapes in medium blue (#5B8FB9) that read as a small blossoming flower, symbolizing growth and self-care; beneath the head silhouette, add a simple open cupped-hand arc in the same slate blue, subtly cradling the head shape to convey support and community; keep all linework clean, rounded, and minimal with generous negative space so the mark reads clearly at small sizes.'

rows.prompt: Centered on a soft cream background, a large single hexagon outlined in deep amber forms the backbone of the mark, evoking a honeycomb cell; behind it, faint smaller hexagons tile outward at low opacity to suggest a broader honeycomb pattern without cluttering the focal shape; inside the main hexagon, a smooth golden honey drop shape sits slightly bottom-weighted, rendered in a rich gradient from warm amber at the top to deeper burnt-orange at the base, with a small rounded highlight of pale cream to give it a glossy, dripping look; a thin trail of honey drips from the bottom tip of the drop, ending in one small separate droplet beneath the hexagon for added craft detail; a simple, friendly bee silhouette in dark brown with two soft translucent wings rests atop the honey drop, wings slightly overlapping the drop's highlight to tie the elements together; the overall composition is symmetrical and iconic, balanced within the circular negative space of the hexagon, suitable for a premium specialty honey brand mark.

rows.prompt: Center a soft circular badge in dark charcoal (#2B2B2B) as a subtle backdrop disc for contrast; on top, draw a simplified white chef's toque (puffy rounded top with a fitted band) filling the upper two-thirds of the badge; inside the puffy top of the hat, nest a small warm flame shape in gradient orange-to-red (#F4A83B to #D64541) to suggest passion and fire in cooking; beneath the hat's band, cross two slender fork silhouettes in white, tines pointing outward like a laurel to imply personalized, hands-on culinary craft; add a thin white ring outline just inside the badge edge to frame the composition and give it an emblem, seal-like finish; keep all shapes flat, bold, and geometrically simplified for clean scalability at small sizes.

rows.prompt: A dark forest-green hexagon badge with a slightly rounded outline sits centered as the base emblem shape, edged with a thin golden border for a rustic stamped look; inside, a lighter green concentric hexagon ring creates depth like a woodcut frame; behind the main icon, faint radiating lines suggest sunbeams breaking through trees; centered in the badge, a tall stylized pine tree silhouette in deep forest green forms the backdrop, its trunk widening at the base like a mug handle; overlapping the tree at the bottom third, a simplified beer mug silhouette in cream color holds a foamy golden-tan top that blends into the tree's lower branches, merging the two forms into one icon; small hop-leaf shapes in golden mustard flank the mug on either side, echoing pinecones or hops; along the inner curve of the hexagon frame, a subtle rope or wood-grain texture line in muted brown adds a handcrafted, rustic border detail.'

rows.prompt: Centered on a dark charcoal-brown circular badge background, a weathered stone archway forms the outer frame suggesting ancient ruins; inside the arch, a classical fluted column stands vertically at the center, its shaft cracked and slightly eroded like an archaeological relic; the column's vertical flutes transition seamlessly at the top into three curved sound-wave arcs radiating outward like a podcast signal icon, rendered in warm gold; a small sun disk or ankh-like symbol sits atop the column capital, hinting at Egyptian and Mesopotamian motifs; a thin decorative border of simple geometric meander (Greek key) pattern traces the inner edge of the circular badge; all linework uses a warm gold and sandy beige palette against the deep brown background to evoke aged papyrus and desert dusk.

rows.prompt: Center a thin perfect circle outline in soft cream as a quiet backdrop halo, giving the mark a boutique, contained feel; inside it, place a sleek abstract silhouette combining an open pair of scissors and a flowing curl of hair rendered as one continuous black ribbon line with rounded, tapering strokes; let the scissor blades curve outward on the upper right like elegant wings while the handles loop smoothly into a wavy strand of hair sweeping to the lower left, implying motion and softness; add one delicate gold accent dot at the scissor pivot point to serve as a focal jewel and a touch of chic luxury; keep all linework uniform-width and minimal with generous negative space so the icon reads cleanly at small sizes; finish with a subtle thin gold ring just inside the cream circle's edge to frame the composition like a refined emblem.

Center a soft rounded circle badge in pale sky blue as the background shape, giving the logo a friendly coin-like frame. Behind the top of the circle, place a simple bright yellow sun with a few short rounded rays peeking over the rim to suggest a cheerful outdoor pool day. Across the lower half of the circle, layer two overlapping wave bands in teal and deeper blue, drawn as smooth rounded curves like gentle ripples of a pool. Swimming just above the waves, place a small chubby cartoon fish in coral red with a round white belly, a single dot eye, and a curved smile, tilted slightly as if mid-swim. Add a few small white bubble circles of varying size trailing behind the fish to reinforce motion through water. Finish with a slightly thicker white outline around the entire circular badge to give it a clean, sticker-like finish suitable for a kids' brand.

rows.prompt: Center a soft rounded circle in warm off-white (#FFF8F0) as the base plate background, giving the mark a friendly badge shape; behind it place a subtle teal (#2EC4B6) drop shadow offset slightly down-right for depth; inside the circle draw a stylized plate as a simple thin dark ring (#1B1B1E); atop the plate place a bold orange (#FF6B35) speed-swoosh shape curving from lower-left to upper-right like a comet trail, symbolizing fast delivery; where the swoosh tapers to its point, morph it into a simple fork silhouette with two rounded tines, so the fork appears to be zooming across the plate; add a small teal circular dot trailing behind the swoosh's tail to reinforce motion, like a motion-blur speed dot; keep all shapes geometric, rounded, and flat with no gradients so the logo stays crisp and iconic at small app-icon sizes.

rows.prompt: Center a large soft-edged circle in deep navy as the background badge, giving weight and a tailoring-guild feel; inside it, place a slender golden needle angled diagonally from lower-left to upper-right, its eye clearly rendered as a small oval near the top; thread a curving gold line through the needle's eye that loops downward and forms a graceful figure-eight stitch pattern beneath it, suggesting a spool of thread unwound; cross a pair of open tailor's scissors in burgundy behind the needle at a slight angle, handles visible at the bottom, blades peeking above the thread loop; add a thin cream-colored ring just inside the navy circle's edge to frame the composition like a button or spool rim; finish with a tiny measuring-tape tick pattern along the inner ring's lower arc in muted gold to reinforce the tailoring craft.”}}

A soft circular backdrop in pale off-white fills the canvas edge to edge, giving the mark room to breathe; centered within it, a gently curved vertical spine made of 6-7 rounded vertebra segments stacked and slightly offset to suggest an S-curve of natural alignment, rendered in deep teal-blue; a thin flowing line threads through the vertebrae like a nerve or energy path, colored in a lighter teal to suggest connectivity and wellness; an open, cupped hand shape wraps gently around the lower half of the spine from behind, rendered in warm orange, symbolizing care and adjustment; a small radiant burst of three short curved lines sits above the topmost vertebra, colored in the same warm orange, representing relief and renewed energy; the entire composition is balanced symmetrically on a vertical axis, kept simple and iconic enough to scale down for a favicon.

Center a dark navy circular backdrop that gives the mark depth and contrast against the background; inset within it, place a bold octagonal shield outline rendered in a bright violet-to-cyan gradient, evoking a controller badge or achievement icon; behind the shield, add a subtle radiating glow in cyan to suggest a screen or power-up energy; inside the octagon, place a crisp white triangular play-button arrow angled slightly forward, symbolizing gameplay and forward momentum; overlay two thin geometric notches at the top corners of the octagon styled like joystick nubs or controller buttons in cyan, adding a playful mechanical detail; finish with a thin outer ring stroke in cyan encircling the whole badge to unify the shape and give it a polished, emblematic studio-logo feel.

A soft circular badge sits at the back as a pale sage-green disc, grounding the mark with a sense of wholeness and the earth. Behind the upper half of the circle, a simplified radiant sun made of three short thick rays peeks up in warm deep-green tone, symbolizing hope and growth. In the center, a large stylized leaf shape rises like a flame or sapling, its single bold vein curving upward, rendered in a rich forest-green gradient from dark at the base to bright at the tip. Beneath the leaf, two simplified cupped hand forms curve inward from left and right like a shallow bowl, rendered in a deeper teal-green, symbolizing protection, community, and stewardship cradling the leaf/sun above them. A thin circular outline traces just inside the badge edge, unifying all elements into one cohesive emblem suitable for small-scale reproduction.
